title: External Links Functionality - Functional Test Plan
overview: Functional testing of the External Links feature allowing Assistive Partners to add Amazon, Flipkart, Official Website, and Other links to product listings on the Y4J platform. Covers link form controls, URL validation, PwD product details display, accessibility compliance, admin review, edit/update workflows, error handling, and audit trail.

testCases.title: Verify Add Link Button and Dropdown Options
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in. Product Upload Form is loaded. Additional Information section is visible.
expectedResults: Additional Information section is visible
Add Link button is present and clickable
Clicking Add Link adds a free-text row with Link Type and URL input fields
Link Type field has placeholder: 'e.g., Purchase Link, Demo Link, Documentation, Support'
URL field has placeholder: 'https://...'
Remove link 1 button is visible
testCases.postconditions: Add Link row is displayed with Link Type and URL fields

testCases.title: Add Amazon Purchase Link Field
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in. Product Upload Form is loaded.
expectedResults: Link Type input field is visible and labelled correctly
URL input field is visible
Remove button is present (field is optional — can be removed)
Counter shows (1/6 links)
testCases.postconditions: Amazon link input field is displayed

testCases.title: Add Multiple Link Types Simultaneously
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in. Product Upload Form is loaded.
steps: Add Amazon Purchase Link row and fill type and URL
Add Flipkart Purchase Link row and fill type and URL
Add Official Website Link row and fill type and URL
Verify all 3 rows are displayed with correct values
Verify each row has a Remove button
expectedResults: All 3 link rows are displayed simultaneously
Each row shows the correct Link Type and URL values
Counter shows (3/6 links)
Remove link 1, Remove link 2, Remove link 3 buttons are all visible
testCases.postconditions: All link fields are displayed and fillable

testCases.title: Validate Invalid URL Format
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in. Product Upload Form is loaded.
steps: Scroll to Additional Information section and add a link row
Enter invalid URL: 'invalid-url' in the URL field
expectedResults: Form does not submit
Page stays on /partner/product-upload
URL field still contains the invalid value (not cleared)
testCases.postconditions: Form remains on product upload page with invalid URL

testCases.title: Validate URL Protocol Requirement
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in. Product Upload Form is loaded.
steps: Scroll to Additional Information section and add a link row
Enter URL without protocol: 'example.com' in the URL field
expectedResults: Form does not submit
Page stays on /partner/product-upload
URL field still contains the no-protocol value
testCases.postconditions: Form remains on product upload page with missing protocol URL

testCases.title: Validate Amazon Domain Requirement
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in. Product Upload Form is loaded.
steps: Scroll to Additional Information section and add a link row
Set link type to 'Amazon Purchase Link'
Enter non-Amazon URL: 'https://example.com/product' in the URL field
expectedResults: Form does not submit
Page stays on /partner/product-upload
URL field still contains the non-Amazon URL
testCases.postconditions: Form remains on product upload page with invalid Amazon URL

testCases.title: Validate Flipkart Domain Requirement
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in. Product Upload Form is loaded.
steps: Scroll to Additional Information section and add a link row
Set link type to 'Flipkart Purchase Link'
Enter non-Flipkart URL: 'https://example.com/product' in the URL field
expectedResults: Form does not submit
Page stays on /partner/product-upload
URL field still contains the non-Flipkart URL
testCases.postconditions: Form remains on product upload page with invalid Flipkart URL

testCases.title: Accept Valid Amazon URL
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in. Product Upload Form is loaded.
steps: Scroll to Additional Information section and add a link row
Set link type to 'Amazon Purchase Link'
Verify no error state on the URL field
Verify link row count shows 1 link
expectedResults: No error state on URL field
URL field retains the valid Amazon URL value
Counter shows (1/6 links)
testCases.postconditions: Amazon link row filled with valid URL

testCases.title: Display Amazon Link with Proper Labeling
testCases.preconditions: Public catalog product page is accessible. Product slug: 'wheelchair-16-03'.
steps: Clear cookies and navigate to public product page at qa-atad.swarajability.org with ?bypass_auth=1
Verify Contact Vendor button is present and visible
Click Contact Vendor to open vendor details panel
Verify vendor details panel heading is visible
Verify product links container (.atad-product-links-root) is present in the panel
expectedResults: Product heading (h1) is visible
Contact Vendor button is visible
Vendor details panel opens after clicking Contact Vendor
Vendor Details heading is visible in the panel
Product links container is present in the panel
testCases.postconditions: Vendor details panel is open with product links container visible

testCases.title: AP Updates Amazon Link
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in. Approved product 'goggles' exists with no existing links.
steps: Wait for approved products to be visible
Add Amazon Purchase Link with valid URL: 'https://www.amazon.in/product/B08XYZ123'
Click Update Product to save changes
expectedResults: Edit Product dialog opens successfully
Amazon link row added with correct type and URL
Update Product saves changes and closes dialog
Product shows 'Edited' badge (Toggle edit details for goggles button visible)
Under Review count is at least 1
testCases.postconditions: Product 'goggles' is in Under Review state with updated Amazon link
